summary: Last known local health snapshot for the static prototype and CLI verification loop.

checks.label: Preview server
checks.detail: Client loads from 127.0.0.1:4190; CLI repair script checks GET / and restarts empty-response listeners.

checks.label: Data health
checks.detail: Last validation passed with 48 seed games and 0 issues.

checks.label: Browser smoke
checks.detail: Last smoke covered first-run swipe: 0/30 to 1/30, next card advanced, undo rendered, no page errors.

checks.label: App view smoke
checks.detail: Today, Library, Discover, Wishlist, and Data navigation switch the expected panels, shelves, clusters, and persisted active view.

checks.label: Library/Wishlist smoke
checks.detail: Library/Wishlist dashboards render, queue filters work, Wishlist exposes 8 triage rows with 24 quick actions, and Bought persists the selected game as owned forever.

checks.label: Game detail smoke
checks.detail: Detail drawer opens from the hero, renders status cards, facts, atoms, RAWG cover attribution, persists Play as playing, and closes cleanly.

checks.label: Design smoke
checks.detail: Desktop and mobile screenshots passed with the full 48 RAWG candidate cover set; visual smoke timeout now handles remote-image screenshots.

checks.label: Visual catalog smoke
checks.detail: Catalog shelf switched from Smart to Catalog, rendered 24 cards, and quick Play saved the selected game as Playing with active button state.

checks.label: Cover resolver
checks.detail: RAWG key is loaded from .env.local. Resolver stored attributed cover candidates for all 48 seed records; future imports still fall back to generated posters until resolved.

checks.label: Provider endpoint
checks.detail: Port 4191 is optional. Live RAWG UI check saved Stray to wishlist with coverUrl, sourceUrl, provider, and cover license note; fixture fallback keeps no-key search usable.

notes: Browser UI can only show client-observable state and the last recorded CLI snapshot.
Run the listed commands from the project root when a row needs verification or repair.
